story.iWant: a visual workflow editor to define workflow inputs
story.soThat: I can create and modify reusable workflows without manually editing YAML/JSON files.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: **AC-4.1**: Editor loads workflow definition (or empty for new workflow)
**AC-4.2**: Inputs panel allows adding/removing inputs with type, required, description fields
**AC-4.4**: Step type selection modal (Tool, MCP, Prompt) displayed when adding step
**AC-4.5**: Step configuration forms display based on type (ToolStepConfig, MCPStepConfig, PromptStepConfig)
**AC-4.6**: Outputs panel allows mapping step outputs to workflow outputs (variable references)
**AC-4.7**: Save button validates workflow (required fields, circular dependencies, valid variable references)
**AC-4.8**: Cancel button discards changes with unsaved changes confirmation
**AC-4.9**: Validation errors displayed in editor UI (e.g., "Step 3 references undefined variable {{step5.output}}")

constraints.constraint: IPC communication patterns between main and renderer processes

ideas.idea: Test: **AC-4.1**: Editor loads workflow definition (or empty for new workflow)...
Test: **AC-4.2**: Inputs panel allows adding/removing inputs with type, required, desc...
Test: **AC-4.3**: Steps panel allows adding/removing/reordering steps (drag-and-drop)...
Test: **AC-4.4**: Step type selection modal (Tool, MCP, Prompt) displayed when adding ...
Test: **AC-4.5**: Step configuration forms display based on type (ToolStepConfig, MCPS...
